en.text: a primitive root (identical with H6328 through the idea of dropping out; compare H5312); to issue, i.e. furnish; causatively, to secure; figuratively, to succeed

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root (identical with H6328 through the idea of dropping out; compare H5312); to issue, i.e. furnish; causatively, to secure; figuratively, to succeed
